<a href="https://pythondiscord.com"><img width="240" align="right" src="https://github.com/lemonsaurus/lemonsaurus/blob/main/ducky.png?raw=true"></a>

Hi! I'm Lemon. I make stuff. Sometimes people like the stuff I make. 🍋

Some stuff I did:
- One of the founders of [Python Discord](https://pythondiscord.com)
- I make games with [tiny doom](https://tinydoom.com)
- I run a weird AI consultancy called [Hideous Monster](https://hideous.monster)
- Worked on healthtech systems like [Dignio](https://dignio.no) and [Journalia](https://journalia.no)
- Ran the engineering team that built [Call Connector](https://callconnector.ai)
- I maintain some open-source packages, like [blackbox](https://github.com/lemonsaurus/blackbox), [django-simple-bulma](https://github.com/lemonsaurus/django-simple-bulma) and [agency](https://github.com/lemonsaurus/agency).
- Appeared on a couple of podcasts, including [Talk Python](https://talkpython.fm/episodes/show/305/python-community-at-python-discord)!
- Wrote a song about the Python Style guide that went a little viral, [The PEP8 Song](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wNcobO-TAyY).
- Sometimes I make [other music](https://soundcloud.com/lemonsaurusrex)
- My website is an [old-school c64-style terminal](https://lemonsaur.us/)
